# SafeSwap

> Anti-rug and anti-whale protection hook for Uniswap V4, deployed on Arbitrum One.

## What it does

SafeSwap is a Uniswap V4 hook that enforces sell-side protections on token pools:

- **Sell Rate Limiting**: Maximum sell amount per wallet per time window (e.g., 2% of supply per 24h)
- **Cooldown Between Sells**: Minimum time between sells per wallet (e.g., 60 seconds)
- **Progressive Fees**: Larger sells pay higher LP fees (0.30% base, up to 5% for whale sells)
- **Launch Protection Mode**: Stricter limits during the first hours after pool creation
- **Immutable Configuration**: Pool parameters cannot be changed after creation

## Contracts (Arbitrum One, verified on Arbiscan)

- SafeSwapHook: 0x66af5C4D7bA72dA6c635B26589C0af86353aE0C0
- SafeSwapFactory: 0x7704377059CF4Eb88050445B78f1d6b1eb1fa78A
- PoolManager (Uniswap V4): 0x360E68faCcca8cA495c1B759Fd9EEe466db9FB32

## How to create a protected pool

Call `createPool` on the SafeSwapFactory contract with:
- memeToken: address of the token to protect
- pairedToken: address of the paired token (e.g., WETH)
- tickSpacing: pool tick spacing (e.g., 60)
- sqrtPriceX96: initial price
- maxSellBps: max sell per window in basis points (200 = 2%)
- windowDuration: rate limit window in seconds (86400 = 24h)
- cooldownSeconds: min seconds between sells
- launchDurationSeconds: launch protection duration (0 to disable)
- launchMaxBuyBps, launchMaxSellBps, launchCooldownSeconds: launch mode params

## Fee tiers

| Sell size (% of supply) | Fee   |
|-------------------------|-------|
| < 0.1%                  | 0.30% |
| 0.1% – 0.5%            | 1.00% |
| 0.5% – 1.0%            | 3.00% |
| > 1.0%                  | 5.00% |

## Links

- Source code: https://github.com/zontak/SafeSwap
- License: MIT
- Built by: Kristiyan Petrov (https://github.com/zontak)

## Known limitations

- Uses tx.origin for seller identification (works for EOA wallets, not smart contract wallets)
- Not formally audited
- Protects against large sudden sells only, not gradual selling within limits
